note: FEATURE LANE: revive source-discovery - migrate atlas.source_catalog (add+populate source_key/name/url/state from 483 discovered datasets) + restart engine so it processes the backlog -> 10+/day new sources.

steps.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Revive source-discovery (exit-0-safe): migrate atlas.source_catalog so the engine's
expected columns (source_key/name/url/state/...) exist and are populated from the 483
already-discovered datasets (domain/fourbyfour/dataset_name). Then restart the engine so it
classifies + connects the backlog -> unlocks 10+/day. Small table, DDL is instant."""
import os,sys,json,time,subprocess
def sh(c,t=40):
    try:
        r=subprocess.run(["bash","-lc",c],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=t);return (r.stdout+r.stderr).strip()
    except Exception: return "ERR"
def psql(q,t=30):
    r=subprocess.run(["sudo","-u","postgres","psql","tuanichat_atlas","-c",q],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=t)
    return (r.stdout.strip()+(' | ERR:'+r.stderr.strip() if r.returncode else '')) if (r.stdout or r.stderr) else ('rc=%d'%r.returncode)
out={"kind":"revive_disc","ts":int(time.time())}
try:
    mig = """
    ALTER TABLE atlas.source_catalog
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_key text,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS name text,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS url text,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS state text,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS legal_class text,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS relevance text,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sample_row_count int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sample_fields jsonb,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sample_error text,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS wiring_priority double precision NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reject_reasons jsonb,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_tested_at timestamptz,
      ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_state_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now();
    """
    out["alter"]=psql(mig)
    upd = """UPDATE atlas.source_catalog SET
      source_key = COALESCE(source_key, 'socrata_'||fourbyfour),
      name = COALESCE(name, dataset_name),
      url  = COALESCE(url, 'https://'||domain||'/resource/'||fourbyfour||'.json'),
      state = COALESCE(state, 'SOURCE_CANDIDATE')
      WHERE fourbyfour IS NOT NULL AND (source_key IS NULL OR name IS NULL OR url IS NULL OR state IS NULL);"""
    out["update"]=psql(upd)
    out["uniq_idx"]=psql("CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS source_catalog_skey ON atlas.source_catalog(source_key)")
    out["candidates"]=psql("SELECT state, count(*) FROM atlas.source_catalog GROUP BY state")
    # restart engine
    sh("systemctl reset-failed atlas-source-discovery.service 2>/dev/null")
    out["restart"]=sh("systemctl restart atlas-source-discovery.service 2>&1; echo rc=$?")
    time.sleep(12)
    out["state_after"]=sh("systemctl is-active atlas-source-discovery.service 2>/dev/null")
    out["journal"]=sh("journalctl -u atlas-source-discovery.service -n 10 --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -10")
except Exception as e: out["error"]=str(e)
def envf(p):
    d={}
    try:
        for ln in open(p):
            ln=ln.strip()
            if ln.startswith('export '): ln=ln[7:]
            if '=' in ln and not ln.startswith('#'):
                k,v=ln.split('=',1); d[k.strip()]=v.strip().strip('"').strip("'")
    except Exception: pass
    return d
try:
    import base64,urllib.request,urllib.error
    env=envf("/etc/atlas/autopull.env"); tok=env.get("STATUS_TOKEN") or os.environ.get("STATUS_TOKEN"); repo=env.get("STATUS_REPO") or "cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests"
    url="https://api.github.com/repos/%s/contents/status/hetzner/revive-disc.json"%repo; sha=None
    if tok:
        try:
            r=urllib.request.Request(url+"?ref=main",headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+tok,"Accept":"application/vnd.github+json","User-Agent":"atlas"}); sha=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(r,timeout=20)).get("sha")
        except Exception: sha=None
        body={"message":"revive_disc","content":base64.b64encode(json.dumps(out,indent=2,default=str).encode()).decode(),"branch":"main"}
        if sha: body["sha"]=sha
        for _ in range(6):
            try:
                rq=urllib.request.Request(url,data=json.dumps(body).encode(),method="PUT",headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+tok,"Accept":"application/vnd.github+json","User-Agent":"atlas","Content-Type":"application/json"}); urllib.request.urlopen(rq,timeout=25); break
            except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
                if e.code==409:
                    try:
                        rq2=urllib.request.Request(url+"?ref=main",headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+tok,"Accept":"application/vnd.github+json","User-Agent":"atlas"}); body["sha"]=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(rq2,timeout=20)).get("sha")
                    except Exception: pass
                else: break
            except Exception: time.sleep(2)
except Exception: pass
sys.exit(0)
